terms.title: Terms of Service & Community Code of Conduct
terms.section_1_text: La Piazza is a free, open-source community platform for renting, lending, selling, and sharing items and services between neighbors. We charge no platform fees. We take no commission. The platform exists to connect people, not to profit from them.
terms.section_2_text: You must be 18 or older to register. You are responsible for your account credentials and all activity under your account. One person, one account. Your workshop profile is your storefront -- keep it honest.
terms.section_3_text: When you list an item, you represent that you own it or have the right to rent/sell it. Prices, deposits, and terms are between you and the other party. La Piazza does not process payments, hold deposits, or guarantee transactions. All financial arrangements are between users.
terms.section_4_text: Reviews must be honest and based on real transactions. Fake reviews, review manipulation, and retaliation reviews are grounds for suspension. Your badge tier reflects community trust -- earn it honestly.
terms.section_5_text: If a transaction goes wrong, try to resolve it directly first. If you cannot, file a dispute through the platform. A moderator will review the evidence and make a decision. Moderator decisions are final for the platform, but do not replace your legal rights.
terms.section_6_items: Illegal items or services;Weapons, drugs, or stolen property;Harassment, hate speech, or discrimination;Spam, scams, or fraudulent listings;Impersonation of other users;Sharing others' personal information
terms.section_7_text: La Piazza is built on trust between neighbors. We expect every member to:
terms.section_7_items: Treat every person with respect regardless of language, background, or skill level;Honor your commitments -- if you agree to rent or return, follow through;Return items in the condition you received them;Respond to messages within a reasonable time;Leave honest reviews after every transaction;Report problems instead of retaliating;Remember there is a real person on the other side of every listing
terms.section_8_text: You own the content you post (photos, descriptions, reviews). By posting, you grant La Piazza a license to display it on the platform. You can delete your content at any time. We will never sell your data.
terms.section_9_text:
We collect only what we need to run the platform: your name, email, location (approximate), and transaction history. Your exact address is never shown publicly -- locations are blurred to a 500m radius.

**Cookies we use:**
- bh_session: authentication (essential, expires when you log out)
- bh_lang: your language preference (essential, 1 year)
- bh_ref: referral tracking if you clicked an invite link (30 days, one-time use)

We do NOT use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party analytics.

**Where your data is stored:** Hetzner Cloud, Germany (EU). All data stays in the European Union.

**Your rights (GDPR):**
- Download all your data: Dashboard > Settings > Download My Data
- Delete your account and all data: Dashboard > Settings > Danger Zone
- Correct your data: Dashboard > Settings > Edit Profile
- Contact us about privacy: angel.kenel@gmail.com

**Data retention:** Your data is kept as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all personal data is permanently erased within 30 days. Transaction records may be kept in anonymized form for legal compliance.
terms.section_10_text: La Piazza is provided as-is. We do our best to keep the platform running and safe, but we cannot guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of listed items, the truth of listings, or the ability of users to complete transactions. Use common sense. Meet in public places for high-value exchanges.
terms.section_11_text: We may update these terms. Material changes will be announced on the platform. Continued use after changes means acceptance.
terms.section_12_text: Questions? Open an issue on GitHub or reach out through the platform. Telegram: @BigKingFisher
terms.section_13_text: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation, you have the right to:
terms.section_13_items: Access: view all your data in your dashboard and profile;Rectification: update your profile information at any time;Erasure: delete your account in Settings > Danger Zone -- this permanently removes your personal data;Portability: contact us to request an export of your data;Objection: remove your WhatsApp number and unlink Telegram at any time in Settings
terms.section_14_text: If you add your WhatsApp number in Settings, logged-in buyers can request it when they click 'Contact on WhatsApp' on your listing. Your number is never visible in the page source -- it is only provided via authenticated API request with an audit trail. Once shared with a buyer, you cannot revoke their access to your number. You can remove your number from Settings at any time to stop future sharing. For contact without sharing your phone number, use Telegram or the built-in messaging instead.
terms.section_15_text: We use a single session cookie (bh_session) to keep you logged in. We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party analytics. That's it. One cookie. No tricks.
terms.section_16_text: La Piazza does not provide insurance of any kind. Sellers are responsible for their own liability coverage. Buyers are responsible for items in their possession during a rental period. We strongly recommend that high-value or dangerous items be covered by the seller's own insurance policy before listing. Deposits are agreed between buyer and seller directly -- La Piazza does not hold, process, or guarantee deposits.
terms.section_17_text: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account and use the platform. Certain listings (power tools, vehicles, equipment) may require age verification at the seller's discretion. Sellers may refuse to complete a transaction if they believe the buyer is underage.
terms.acceptance: By creating an account, you agree to these terms and commit to our community code of conduct.

account.delete_description: Once deleted, your account and all data are gone forever. There is no undo. Think carefully.
account.lose_profile: Your profile, workshop, bio, and avatar
account.lose_items: All your items, listings, and active bookings
account.lose_reputation: All your points, badge tier, and trust score
account.lose_achievements: All your achievements, streaks, and leaderboard rank
account.delete_permanent: This action is PERMANENT. There is no way to recover your account, your reputation, or your data. Ever.
account.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

i18n.help_neighbors_find_you_location_is_roun: Help neighbors find you. Location is rounded for privacy.
i18n.find_a_maker_in_your_neighborhood: Find a Maker in Your Neighborhood
i18n.search_by_skill_workshop_type_or_service: Search by skill, workshop type, or service offered.
i18n.my_father_was_a_handshovel_landscaper_fo: My father was a hand-shovel landscaper for 60 years in Switzerland. 500 tools in his garage, every one with a story. When he passed in 2020, those tools sat there. Every neighborhood has a garage like his. Every neighborhood has an artist who teaches, a sailor who gives lessons, a chef who shares recipes, a maker who fixes things. They just haven't met yet. La Piazza is the town square where they find each other. No commissions. No algorithms. Just people helping people.
i18n.built_from_a_camper_van_in_trapani_sicil: Built from a camper van in Trapani, Sicily. 2026.
i18n.ask_anything_about_items_services_or_com: Ask anything about items, services, or community members
i18n.whatsapp_consent: By adding your WhatsApp number, you consent to sharing it with registered buyers who click "Contact on WhatsApp" on your listings. Once shared, you cannot revoke access to your number. You can block unwanted contacts in WhatsApp and remove your number here to stop future sharing. To communicate without sharing your phone number, use Telegram or the built-in messaging instead.
i18n.ltfm_subtitle: Four ways to bring your neighborhood to life.
i18n.ltfm_learn_desc: Find a neighbor who knows what you want to learn. Welding, baking, languages, music -- real skills from real people.
i18n.ltfm_teach_desc: Share what you know. List a course, a workshop, a one-on-one lesson. Your experience is worth something.
i18n.ltfm_fix_desc: Broken bike? Leaky tap? Find a skilled neighbor who can fix it -- or learn how to fix it yourself.
i18n.ltfm_make_desc: Commission a custom piece. Furniture, art, food, clothing -- your neighbors are makers waiting to be found.
i18n.bottega_subtitle: Every maker needs a workshop. Set up your profile, upload your banner, and let the neighborhood know what you do.
i18n.bottega_step_2: Name your workshop and pick a type
i18n.quote_description_placeholder: Describe the work, timeline, any special requirements...
i18n.quote_message_placeholder: Any additional notes for the provider...
